completed_tasks.name: Plan 11-01: import execution orchestrator
completed_tasks.progress: Implemented execute.ts, outcome/result types, summary formatter, idempotency, source mismatch checks, marketplace failure isolation, classified install outcomes, single reload-hint aggregation, import barrel exports, and installPlugin notification/outcome seam. Tests passed: npm test -- tests/orchestrators/import/execute.test.ts; npm test -- tests/orchestrators/import/execute.test.ts tests/orchestrators/plugin/install.test.ts; npm run typecheck. SUMMARY.md not created yet and code not committed.

completed_tasks.name: Plan 11-02 Task 1: Add import edge handler with both-scope default
completed_tasks.progress: Created edge/handlers/plugin/import.ts and tests/edge/handlers/import.test.ts. Handler uses parseArgs, rejects positionals with usage, defaults omitted scope to [user, project], narrows explicit scope, and delegates to importClaudeSettings with pi/cwd/gitOps.

completed_tasks.name: Plan 11-02 Task 2: Route and document top-level import command
completed_tasks.progress: Extended SubcommandHandlers, TOP_LEVEL_USAGE, and routeClaudePlugin for import; updated router tests including usage coverage.

completed_tasks.name: Plan 11-02 Task 3: Update tab completion provider for import
completed_tasks.progress: Added import to TOP_LEVEL_SUBCOMMANDS and completion tests for top-level import, --scope values, --scope flag, and no plugin-ref completions for import positionals.

completed_tasks.name: Plan 11-02 Task 4: Wire import handler in registration
completed_tasks.progress: Wired makeImportHandler in register.ts, updated command description, extended EdgeDeps with optional test seam for importClaudeSettings, and added register test proving import routes through registered command. Edge targeted tests passed.

remaining_tasks.name: Re-run final validation for current uncommitted state
remaining_tasks.details: Run npm run typecheck after the latest edge changes, then targeted Plan 11 commands: npm test -- tests/orchestrators/import/execute.test.ts tests/orchestrators/import/settings.test.ts tests/orchestrators/import/refs.test.ts tests/orchestrators/import/marketplaces.test.ts and npm test -- tests/edge/handlers/import.test.ts tests/edge/router.test.ts tests/edge/completions/provider.test.ts tests/edge/register.test.ts.

remaining_tasks.name: Review and commit Plan 11-01 implementation
remaining_tasks.details: Inspect implementation for rough edges, create .planning/phases/11-import-command-orchestration/11-01-SUMMARY.md, update STATE/ROADMAP/requirements if following execute-plan protocol, and commit Plan 11-01 code/docs.

remaining_tasks.name: Review and commit Plan 11-02 implementation
remaining_tasks.details: Create .planning/phases/11-import-command-orchestration/11-02-SUMMARY.md and commit edge command wiring after validation.

remaining_tasks.name: Plan 11-03: command-level e2e fixtures and final validation
remaining_tasks.details: Build rich import command fixtures, add e2e tests, update 11-VALIDATION.md, run targeted Phase 11 tests and npm run check.

blockers.description: No technical blocker. Work is intentionally paused with substantial uncommitted implementation. Plan summaries and commits have not been created yet.
blockers.workaround: Resume by validating, reviewing, then creating summaries/commits before continuing to Plan 11-03.

decisions.decision: installPlugin now has an optional notifications seam with reloadHint suppress and returnOutcome true, preserving default immediate reload behavior for normal installs.
decisions.rationale: Import needs to reuse install internals while aggregating reload guidance once at the end.

decisions.decision: importClaudeSettings exposes injectable deps for tests while production defaults delegate to loadMergedClaudeSettingsForScope, loadState, addMarketplace, and installPlugin.
decisions.rationale: Keeps orchestration testable without duplicating marketplace/plugin mutation logic.

decisions.decision: EdgeDeps gained an optional importClaudeSettings test seam while retaining gitOps for marketplace add delegation.
decisions.rationale: Registration tests can prove import routing without performing real disk/network mutations; production continues to use the real orchestrator.

validation_evidence: npm test -- tests/orchestrators/import/execute.test.ts: passed after initial implementation
npm run typecheck: passed before latest edge wiring changes
npm test -- tests/edge/handlers/import.test.ts tests/edge/router.test.ts tests/edge/completions/provider.test.ts tests/edge/register.test.ts: passed after latest completion-test fix

placeholder_summary_scan.note: grep for To be filled|placeholder|TBD found many historical planning files outside current Phase 11 summaries. Phase 11 has no SUMMARY.md files yet; treat 11-01 and 11-02 as incomplete until summaries are created.

next_action: Run npm run typecheck, then the targeted Phase 11 tests. If green, review the uncommitted diff, create 11-01-SUMMARY.md and 11-02-SUMMARY.md, commit Plan 11-01 and Plan 11-02 work, then start 11-03 e2e fixtures.
context_notes: The session used TDD-style red/green for new import orchestration and edge tests. Plan 11-01 implementation is functionally present but may benefit from review for type/API polish before commit. Plan 11-02 edge wiring is also present and targeted edge tests are green. No e2e fixture work has started. Avoid assuming official completion because no GSD summaries/commits exist for Phase 11 yet.
